---
name: Profile change or feature
about: Propose a change to the profile, a verifier requirement, or tooling
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

The problem this change solves. Describe the problem, not only the proposed
wording. Security standards fail most often from unstated assumptions.

## Proposed change

What you propose to add, change, or remove.

## Threat model impact

How this affects the threats in `threat-register.md`. If the change weakens a
defense, say so and justify it.

## Affected surfaces

For a normative change, every section, schema, example, and fixture affected.
`spec.md` and `verifier-conformance.md` must not drift apart.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why they were not chosen.
